entry.title: Morbid Curiosity
entry.summary:
Author: Charlie_bear_23

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,369Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Bruce Wayne has always has always been a very good person, it's what makes him such a good detective.But, that morbid curiosity has put him in a difficult position... because when it's Superman's, your friend and colleagues, dick you're curious about it can make things interesting.

entry.title: the best parts of lonely
entry.summary:
Author: Ferox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,002Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 234

Summary: Clark Kent has a pretty great thing going for him. He's the backup goalie for the Gotham Blades, the worst team in NHL history, and he's working on his journalism degree. He never has to worry about money and he's got plenty of free time to be Superman and partner with the Justice League. It's all going really well. Until Bruce Wayne ruins everything. “When I asked you what you wanted for your birthday, you said you wanted the Blades to,” Bruce used air quotes which shouldn't be endearing, “win an ‘effing’ game for once in your life.” "What,” Jason barks out a laugh, “you’re gonna bribe a ref or somethin’?” “Goodness no!” Bruce cries out dramatically clutching his hands to his chest, utterly scandalized. “What do you take me for? A criminal? Of course not, Jason. I would never! I am a good influence.” Jason continues to glare at him, clearly waiting for something. “I bought the team,” Bruce announces.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Same Childhood Dream
entry.summary:
Author: Voc_Vocalist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,274Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Bruce Wayne is already 34; soon, he’ll be 35. And then? Well, let the 40s come, the 50s, along with the white hairs and the chronic pains. And yet, one thing does not change: he is still mentally ill, depressed in an existential way. He is no longer a teenager; the world does not forgive him for being depressed. Someone his age with this kind of thought, with the suicidal ideation, the urge to self-harm, it’s almost pathetic.   When his patheticness begins to jeopardize the Justice League, Clark Kent, his brilliant Superman, gets involved.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Ghost King's Family (of Knights)
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,197Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 166

Summary: The GIW had found Danny. His Parents had sacrificed themselves to try to protect not only him but his fraid. However, the GIW were one step ahead of them and had erected a barrier that no ghost or human could pass through. Desperate to not only get his fraid to safety but to stop the GIW from destroying the Infinite Realms and in turn all of the other universes, Danny (with the help of Clockwork) used a portal to get his fraid out of Amity Park for help.

entry.title: They're Yet to Invent a Sea Big Enough
entry.summary:
Author: Donnaez

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,946Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 235

Summary: A virus temporarily turns the Dark Knight into a vulnerable, bedridden man. Clark and Alfred are, of course, by his side for as long as they can. However, since they have never seen Bruce sick in their life, every one of his children believe that "being sick" was actually a code for wishing to be alone. Maybe it's better that way, nobody should ever see him like this. Or, Bruce Wayne learns the hard way how to allow himself to be vulnerable around the people he loves while running high on a fever and extremely emotional. And a bonus chapter with Clark being the one sick this time!

entry.title: Power
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 208,001Chapters: 39/?Kudos: 358

Summary: “Oh, you do like to flirt, don’t you?” Lex accused almost playfully, if not for the sharklike emptiness in his eyes. Bruce sat back as the appetizer plates were taken away and replaced with the entrée: filet mignon in a mushroom gravy, served with truffles, asparagus, and black garlic potatoes. He couldn’t help but think Clark would have appreciated this. And he desperately wished he was here with him rather than Vicki. He flashed a playful grin at Lex. “Flirting is what makes the world go round, Lex. What is that quote attributed to Oscar Wilde? ‘Everything in the world is about sex except sex, which is about power’. It applies to everything. Make people think you want them, and you’ve got the whole world in your hands.” After years of living in the closet, trying to ignore the truth, Bruce is finally cornered and is forced to come out in a very public way. This leads to a series of challenges, blending his public and private life in way he can’t escape.

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Yevgeny

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,502Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 53

Summary: Clark Kent has spent his entire college career becoming impossible to notice. Bruce Wayne has spent his becoming impossible to know. By all reasonable calculations, they should have stayed strangers—two people on a campus of twenty-eight thousand, each too committed to their own disappearing act to stumble into anyone else's. Reasonable calculations, as it turns out, do not account for assigned seating, a shared diner booth at eleven p.m., or the oldest rule in physics: that two things with enough mass, brought close enough together, will always—eventually, without fail—begin to pull.

entry.title: Picture You
entry.summary:
Author: harpsichordsandthelit

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,412Chapters: 26/26Kudos: 2,281

Summary: Clark Kent just moved into a new apartment. The building is nice. His neighbors are welcoming. He heard some good things about the guy who lived here before him.And then he received a postcard.  Hey, I used to live in your apartment. I’m drunk in Gotham, and it’s the only address I can think of. Happy Holidays. B. W.  Inspired by this Tumblr post

entry.title: Don't Dream it's Over
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,817Chapters: 12/20Kudos: 73

Summary: Eight months after Clark and Lois’s divorce, a breakup letter appears on Commissioner Gordon’s desk—addressed to Batman. But everything about it is wrong. Dear Batman,I can’t do this anymore. Whatever this is between us—it isn’t fair to either of us. You’ve always kept me at a distance, and I told myself I was okay with that, but I’m not.I need something real. Something you were never willing to give me.Don’t try to find me. I’m safe, and I won’t be coming back.I love you. Goodbye.— Superman As Bruce investigates, it quickly becomes clear: maybe the letter isn’t lying about Clark not coming back—and that’s a terrifying thought. Meanwhile, Clark wakes up in a dream life, living beside the man he’s never dared to love… trapped in a prison disguised as perfection.

entry.title: Losing Touch, Gaining His
entry.summary:
Author: averyhatake

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,037Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: A universe where Batman and Superman despite all their time of knowing each other and working together still have yet to reveal their identities. Finally the two first meet as civilians and the ball begins rolling. The two find themselves faltering both as hero's and as people, but will find themselves within one another again.

entry.title: Brown Kryptonite Strikes Again
entry.summary:
Author: Mysteriousimagines

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,497Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 55

Summary: Read the tags, this fic contains eproctophilia, and a lot of farting, you have been warned. Batman and Superman never really got along all that well, Batman was always more cold and clinical, while Superman seemed much more open minded and stubborn, often leading to his downfall. Although Batman never showed it, he always secretly found Superman attractive. Everything about the alien superhero was just perfect. His million dollar smile, those sharp baby blue eyes, his muscular body.When Batman discovers that there's a new type of Kryptonite he didn't know Clark was affected by, he takes matters into his own hands after Clark told him it's not fatal, but didn't disclose the effects.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Lord Batman (Justice Lords Universe)
  • Lord Superman (Justice Lords Universe)
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent is Superman
  • Clark Kent Needs a Hug
  • Bisexual Clark Kent
  • Embarrassed Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne is Batman
  • Farting
  • Fluff and Smut
  • Fluff and Hurt/Comfort
  • Stomach Ache
  • Eproctophilia
